zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix d'Albon於大約1132年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾時，她的父親Guigues IV d'Albon39歲，母親Marguerite de Bourgogne34歲。她和Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1196年在法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix d'Albon于大约1132年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾时，她的父亲Guigues IV d'Albon39岁，母亲Marguerite de Bourgogne34岁。她和Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1196年在法国o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix d'Albon was born about 1132, in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues IV d'Albon, was 39 and her mother, Marguerite de Bourgogne, was 34. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. She died in 1196, in Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix d'Albon est née environ 1132, à Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues IV d'Albon, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bourgogne, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. Elle est décédée en 1196, à Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix d'Albon um 1132 in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues IV d'Albon 39 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Bourgogne 34. Sie hatte mit Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1196 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix d'Albon è nata il circa 1132 nel Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues IV d'Albon, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Bourgogne, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. Morì nel 1196, nel Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix d'Albonが約1132年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアグレノブルで生まれた時，父Guigues IV d'Albonは39歳，母Marguerite de Bourgogneは34歳であった。彼女はAdhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinoisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1196年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスドルoメベレンスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix d'Albon(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 그렌콥일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues IV d'Albon(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Bourgogne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1196년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 드o 발스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix d'Albon nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues IV d'Albon, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bourgogne, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. Ela faleceu em 1196, em Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix d'Albon родилась около 1132 г. в местности гренобл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues IV d'Albon было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bourgogne, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. Она умерла в 1196 г. в местности веиленс, дрoм, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix d'Albon nació aproximadamente 1132, en Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues IV d'Albon, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bourgogne, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Adhémar I de Poitiers-Valentinois. Murió en 1196, en Valence, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
